title: Stockholm Food & Wine Fair Activation
subtitle: Concept-to-install delivery of a branded fair setup with sign and prize wheel.
role: Concept Designer, Production Designer and Installer
summary: This project focused on designing and producing a compact event activation for a trade fair environment. I handled concept work, 3D prototyping, print design, print ordering and final on-site installation.
brief: The brief was to create a clear and attractive branded setup for a fair booth, centered around a metal sign and a prize wheel. The process required high visual impact, practical build decisions and fast delivery from idea to live environment.
team: Solo execution from design to installation
comparisonsIntro: Each deliverable is shown with the final on-site result first, followed by the concept visualization used to plan production.

live.caption: Installed sign at Stockholm Food & Wine.

concept.caption: 3D concept used to validate scale and branding.

live.caption: Installed prize wheel on the fair floor.

concept.caption: Concept mockup for layout, prizes and visual hierarchy.

process.title: 1) Print design and pre-press
process.body: After the concept phase, I finalized production-ready files with attention to dimensions, print quality and visual consistency between all physical components.

process.title: 2) Print procurement
process.body: I ordered and coordinated print production for the sign and wheel components, ensuring output quality matched the approved concept.

process.title: 3) On-site installation
process.body: I assembled the final setup on site and adjusted placement and details in real context to ensure both functionality and visual impact in the fair environment.

images.caption: Close-up of the finished prize wheel surface and branding.

gallery.caption: Full activation on the fair floor.

result: The final delivery provided a clean and engaging activation setup that translated well from concept visualizations to the real fair environment, with a consistent look across all printed components.
